title: Why did Patrick keep on asking the same question?

meanings.usage: 用于指某人或某物过去的状态或职位
在选举、比赛或战争中击败对手
指政治职位的投票选举
指从工作或政治生涯中退出
与政府、政治活动相关的
指去往或身处其他国家
形容对某事物极度热衷甚至不理智
指比赛或政治中的竞争者
对某事或某人感到不信任
指建筑物或场所的入口处

phrases.usage: 继续做某事，反复做某事

examples.en: He kept on asking the same question.
The day after, Patrick went to the house again.
examples.zh: 第二天，Patrick又去了那所房子。

examples.en: On the following day Patrick went to the house again.
examples.zh: 第二天Patrick又去了那所房子。

examples.en: He has gone to live abroad.
Mr. Lane was defeated in the recent elections.
examples.zh: Lane先生在最近的选举中败北了。

examples.en: He is retiring from political life.

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.usage: 描述过去发生的事情，如已完成的选举结果、去过的地点等

examples.en: Patrick went to the former Prime Minister's house.
The policeman told him that Mr. Lane had gone abroad.
examples.zh: 警察告诉他Lane先生已经出国了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某一时刻正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 描述过去正在发生的动作，通常与一般过去时连用

examples.en: The policeman was just walking slowly past the entrance.
While I was reading, the phone rang.
examples.zh: 我正在看书时，电话响了。

grammar.title: 直接引语和间接引语 (Direct and Indirect Speech)
grammar.definition: 直接引用原话为直接引语；转述别人的话为间接引语
grammar.structure: 直接引语用引号；间接引语用that引导
grammar.usage: 转述他人说的话时使用，过去时态中时间状语需要相应调整

examples.en: 'Mr. Lane was defeated in the elections,' he shouted.
examples.zh: 他在喊：'Lane先生在选举中败北了。'

examples.en: He told me that Mr. Lane had been defeated in the elections.
examples.zh: 他告诉我Lane先生在选举中败北了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing when + 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: The policeman was just walking slowly past the entrance when Patrick asked the same question.
original.zh: 警察正慢慢走过门口时，Patrick问了同样的问题。

imitations.en: I was reading a book when the doorbell rang.
imitations.zh: 我正在看书时门铃响了。

imitations.en: She was cooking dinner when I arrived home.
imitations.zh: 我到家时她正在做晚饭。

original.en: I told you yesterday and the day before yesterday.
original.zh: 我昨天和前天都告诉你了。

imitations.en: I told you many times to be careful.
imitations.zh: 我告诉过你很多次要小心。

imitations.en: I told you he would come late.

original.en: I know, but I love to hear you say it!
original.zh: 我知道，但我就是爱听你说！

imitations.en: I know it's expensive, but it's worth it.
I know you're busy, but could you help me?
imitations.zh: 我知道你很忙，但你能帮我吗？

original.en: When he asked if Mr. Lane lived there, the policeman told him...
original.zh: 当他问Lane先生是否住在那里时，警察告诉他...

imitations.en: She asked if I was free tomorrow.
He asked if the train had already left.
imitations.zh: 他问火车是否已经开走了。
